attributes.content:
## Overview

The Personal Finance card gives the workspace a structured home for personal finance dashboard: income, expenses, savings goals, net worth tracking.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Personal Finance acts as a canonical operational record. It keeps important facts, state changes, timestamps, and linked parties in one place so downstream workflows, approvals, and reporting can all rely on the same source of truth.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Calendar]]** -- Calendar can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Personal Finance.
- **[[Task]]** -- Personal Finance often creates follow-up work or is itself tracked through task execution.
- **[[Alert]]** -- Alert can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Personal Finance.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Personal Finance can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Document]]** -- Personal Finance can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Recipe]]** -- Recipe can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Personal Finance.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Personal Finance as the structured home for personal finance dashboard: income, expenses, savings goals, net worth tracking and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Personal Finance when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Personal Finance stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.
